FGO-COOLDOWN_FGO_POWER.smartDescription: %s has no effect but to reduce 1 turn, exist %d turns.
FGO-FAE_QUEEN_POWER.title: Fae Queen
FGO-FAE_QUEEN_POWER.description:
1.At the end of her turn, remove 1 debuff. 
 2.Activate Charisma of Desire once every 3 turns, she gain 2 Strength and you gain 1 Vulnerable.
FGO-FAE_QUEEN_POWER.smartDescription:
1.At the end of her turn, remove 1 debuff. 
 2.Activate Charisma of Desire once every 3 turns, she gain 2 Strength and you gain 1 Vulnerable. It is currently the %dth turn. At the end of this turn, Activate Charisma of Desire.
FGO-ORKNEY_POWER.title: O bell of Orkney!
FGO-ORKNEY_POWER.description: At the end of her turns, you gain 1 Weak, add 2 *Dazed into your discard pile.
FGO-ORKNEY_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of her for %d turns, you gain 1 Weak, add 2 *Dazed into your discard pile.
FGO-NOW_STORM_POWER.title: Now this is a storm.
FGO-NOW_STORM_POWER.description:
1.At the end of her turn, she gain 1 Strength and Thorns. 
 2.Each of her attack intentions will remove one of your buffs.
FGO-NOW_STORM_POWER.smartDescription:
1.At the end of her turn, she gain 1 Strength and Thorns. 
 2.Each of her attack intentions will remove one of your buffs.
FGO-PROPHESIZED_CHILD_POWER.title: Prophesized Child
FGO-PROPHESIZED_CHILD_POWER.description: Activate Charisma of Hope once every 3 turns, you gain 2 Strength and 30% NP.
FGO-PROPHESIZED_CHILD_POWER.smartDescrip: Activate Charisma of Hope once every 3 turns, you gain 2 Strength and 30% NP. It is currently the %dth turn. At the end of this turn, Activate Charisma rof Hope.
FGO-CURSE_DECAYED_FLESH_POWER.title: Curse Decayed Flesh
FGO-CURSE_DECAYED_FLESH_POWER.descriptio: Cernunnos reduces attack damage it takes by 10% and increases its attack damage by 10% for each stack of Evil Curses it has.
FGO-CURSE_DECAYED_FLESH_POWER.smartDescr:
Cernunnos reduces attack damage it takes by 10% and increases its attack damage by 10% for each stack of Evil Curses it has.  
 Whenever Cernunnos is attacked, if it has Evil Curses, it removes 1 Evil Curses, heals 10 HP, and you gain 1 Vulnerable and Evil Curses.
FGO-GAINS_CURSE_LAYER_POWER.title: Gains Curse Layer
FGO-GAINS_CURSE_LAYER_POWER.description:
At the end of each turn, Cernunnos gain 3 Evil Curses. 
 Whenever Cernunnos attack, gain 1 Evil Curses.
FGO-GAINS_CURSE_LAYER_POWER.smartDescrip:
At the end of each turn, Cernunnos gain 3 Evil Curses. 
 Whenever Cernunnos attack, gain 1 Evil Curses.
FGO-WORLDS_END_FLOWER_GARDEN_POWER.title: World's End Flower Garden
FGO-WORLDS_END_FLOWER_GARDEN_POWER.descr: Whenever you deal Critical damage, gain NP.
FGO-WORLDS_END_FLOWER_GARDEN_POWER.smart: Whenever you deal Critical damage, gain %d%% NP.
FGO-NP_PER_TURN_POWER.title: NP per turn
FGO-NP_PER_TURN_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, gain NP.
FGO-NP_PER_TURN_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of each turn, gain %d%% NP.
FGO-LUCKY_SPINNING_POWER.title: Lucky Spinning
FGO-LUCKY_SPINNING_POWER.description: Whenever you deal damage this turn, gain Stars.
FGO-LUCKY_SPINNING_POWER.smartDescriptio: Whenever you deal damage this turn, gain {0} Stars.
FGO-DEPARTURE_OF_THE_SUN_POWER.title: Departure of the Sun
FGO-DEPARTURE_OF_THE_SUN_POWER.descripti: For every Stars you have, NP damage increases by 30%.
FGO-DEPARTURE_OF_THE_SUN_POWER.smartDesc: For every %d Stars you have, NP damage increases by 30%.
FGO-ANTI_BEAST_MAGECRAFT_POWER.title: Anti-beast Magecraft
FGO-ANTI_BEAST_MAGECRAFT_POWER.descripti: Whenever you gain a Power, gain Block.
FGO-ANTI_BEAST_MAGECRAFT_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever you gain a Power, gain %d Block.
FGO-IMAGINARY_SPACE_POWER.title: Imaginary Space
FGO-IMAGINARY_SPACE_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain Energy. If you have Waterside, draw a card.
FGO-IMAGINARY_SPACE_POWER.smartDescripti: At the start of your turn, gain 1 Energy. If you have Waterside, draw 1 card.
